page.title: Subscription
page.subtitle: Review the status of your BuildTrack subscription. Any plan change is arranged with you by email.
contact.subject: My BuildTrack subscription
activation.required.title: Your workspace isn't active.
activation.required.body: Your account was created, but access to BuildTrack is paused.
activation.required.cta: Email us and we'll switch your access on the same day.
activation.pending.title: Payment being confirmed
activation.pending.body: We're waiting for the payment to be confirmed. Until then, the workspace stays locked.
activation.statusError.title: We couldn't verify your subscription status.
activation.statusError.body: Please refresh or contact support. The workspace stays locked until we can confirm your subscription.
status.title: Current subscription
status.configured: Local billing state confirmed by Paddle webhooks.
status.error: The status is unavailable right now.
status.empty.title: No subscription yet
status.empty.body: Email us and we'll set your subscription up.
status.cancelAtPeriodEnd.title: Cancellation scheduled
status.cancelAtPeriodEnd.body: Your subscription will be canceled at the end of the current period ({{date}}). Until then you keep full access.
status.headline.pastDue: Your last payment is past due.
status.headline.paymentRequired: A new payment method is required.
status.headline.error: We couldn't verify your subscription status.
status.body.active: You have full access to BuildTrack. If you need to move plan, email us and we'll handle it for you.
status.body.trialing: You're using BuildTrack on a trial. If you need to move plan, email us and we'll handle it for you.
status.body.pending: We're waiting for the payment to be confirmed. Refresh the status in a few minutes; if nothing changes, email us.
status.body.missing: You don't have an active subscription yet. Email us and we'll set it up for you.
status.body.pastDue: Your access is paused because a payment is past due. Email us and we'll settle it the same day.
status.body.paymentRequired: Your access is paused: the payment method needs updating. Email us and we'll sort it the same day.
status.body.canceled: Your subscription is canceled and access is paused. Email us and we'll switch it back on the same day.
status.body.expired: Your access is paused. Email us and we'll switch it back on the same day.
status.body.incomplete: Your subscription setup was left incomplete. Email us and we'll finish it for you.
status.body.unknown: Refresh the status — if this persists, email us.
status.body.error: Refresh the page or try again. If the issue continues, contact support.
status.cta.contactHint: We reply the same business day.
